name: ASSASSINS
description: Whether you like to dive straight into the fray, support your teammates, or something in between, there’s a spot for you on the Rift.

name: FIGHTERS
description: Fighters are short-range combatants who possess a mix of offensive and defensive capabilities.

name: MAGES
description: Mages are champions who typically possess great reach, ability-based area of effect damage and control.

name: MARKSMEN
description: Marksmen are remote attackers who typically sacrifice defensive power and utility for great incremental damage.

name: SUPPORTS
description: Supports make plays by facilitating their allies' success through shields, heals, or crowd control.

name: TANKS
description: Tanks are durable, front-line champions who help lock down enemies and start fights.
